caption: A man with a beard and shaved head wears a white t-shirt and large over-ear headphones while sitting in a studio. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone mounted on a boom arm, which features the text "Rode" on its side. The background consists of dark gray acoustic foam panels with a ribbed texture. As the sequence progresses, the man is seen smiling and talking, with his expression shifting from a closed-mouth smile to a wider, open-mouth laugh. His head tilts slightly and his eyes crinkle as he reacts to something off-screen. His right arm, featuring a visible tattoo, rests on a surface partially out of view. The camera remains static, focusing on his upper body and head throughout the action.
